job_title: Senior Analyst, Data Science and Analytics
strengths: Strong SQL and Python technical skills
Proven reporting and dashboard delivery (Power BI, Tableau)
Quantified impact on KPIs and operations
Experience building ETL pipelines and data models
weaknesses: No explicit A/B/testing framework experience listed
Only 2+ years relevant marketing/CRM analytics experience
improvement_bullets: Optimized CRM campaign performance by designing and executing A/B testing frameworks, resulting in data-driven refinements that improved customer engagement metrics.
Led customer segmentation initiatives using Salesforce CRM data to personalize marketing communications, directly contributing to a 300% increase in new customer acquisition.
Developed predictive forecasting models to anticipate marketing trends and campaign outcomes, enabling stakeholders to proactively adjust CRM strategies and resource allocation.
Leveraged AI-enabled analytics workflows (ChatGPT, Claude) to accelerate data processing and generate actionable insights for cross-functional marketing teams.
Conducted rigorous post-campaign measurement and diagnostic analysis to identify data quality issues, ensuring CRM reporting integrity for executive decision-making.
cover_letter: Dear Hiring Manager, I am excited to submit my application for the Senior Analyst, Data Science and Analytics opportunity with Razorfish. I am interested in this opportunity because of Razorfish’s reputation for blending creative storytelling with deep technical strategy. What interests me about working for Razorfish is its 'Power of One' approach, which thrives on connecting diverse perspectives to create human-centric digital experiences. I believe my expertise in data-driven storytelling and my technical proficiency in SQL and Python would make me a strong candidate for this role. During my professional career, I have approached problems by translating complex datasets into clear, actionable business narratives. In fact, while at Shine Masters Cleaning Services, I developed interactive Power BI dashboards and time series models that identified high-value segments, which directly informed marketing initiatives and drove a 300% increase in new customer acquisition over 12 months. Ultimately, I know that the Senior Analyst, Data Science and Analytics role at Razorfish would allow me to bring my analytical rigor to the core responsibilities of CRM measurement and campaign analysis. Additionally, my role as a Data Analyst at Shine Masters enabled me to develop my CRM and marketing measurement skills. I managed the end-to-end automation of client workflows and campaign reporting, which reduced processing time by 40% and established a foundation for data-backed decision-making that I am eager to apply at Razorfish. I’m excited by the opportunity to use my statistical thinking in working on campaign performance and testing frameworks at Razorfish. I know that my expertise in building automated data pipelines and my ability to partner with cross-functional teams align with what it takes to succeed at the Senior Analyst role. I would love the opportunity to discuss the role in more detail. Thank you for your time and consideration. I look forward to hearing from you soon. Warm regards, Justin Miller
